calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Antonchuk for Philip Bailey.

Mr. Antonchuk addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Continued To Dec-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Continued To Feb-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jeff Antonchuk appearing for Philip Bailey. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. The mother of the minor has file her petition for guardianship in El Dorado County. Matter is continued to 2/5/07 for status. Temporary Letters is extended to 2/5/07. Order signed. Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Continued To Dec-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jeff Antonchuk appearing for and with petitioner Philip Bailey. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. The Public Administrator has priority. If a guardian is appointed for the minor, the guardian can nominate. Mr. Antonchuk wants the Court to appoint Mr. Bailey today. Court is willing to appoint Mr. Bailey as the Special Administrator today pending the appointment of Guardian in El Dorado county. Bond is fixed in the amount of $800,000.00. Special Letter with general powers will expire on 12/4. Order signed. Matter is continued to 12/4. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Continued To Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
